title: Bin Badal Barsaat
actors: Asha Parekh, Biswajeet Chatterjee, Nishi Kohli
plot: Seventy years ago the wealthy Thakur of Neelamghat had an affair with a gypsy girl, and then married another woman. The gypsy girl's dad placed a curse on the entire Thakur family that whenever a male marries, his wife will die in...
